title: Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Domestic Violence Issues Ex-Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community Mothers Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally-specific counseling with a focus on the Hispanic and Latino community for substance use, anger management, and/or domestic violence. Services are provided through group classes, family, individual, or marriage counseling, one-on-one problem-solving, and family activities. 205 SE 3rd Street Suite 200 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Counseling: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Groups and classes: vary on weekday evenings (503) 681-4870 Get Directions More Details LIFESTANCE HEALTH LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND NE MLK CONEXIONES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers culturally and linguistically specific psychological evaluations and counseling. Evaluations are offered for cognitive functioning, attention problems (ADHD), disabilities, autism, and learning problems or disabilities for individuals from kindergarten age to college/university age. 3500 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latinx identified individuals Hours: Front Desk: Monday-Friday 9am-6:30pm Appointments: Varies (503) 327-8205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery services for alcohol and substance abuse, gambling, and other addictions. Early intervention classes for youth who have received minor-in-possession are also available. Treatment by phone or telehealth. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Recovery Center Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Other services by appointment only Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide individual and group therapy for individuals seeking treatment for addictions, including problem gambling. Also provide peer, educational, and prevention services for adults, youth, and families. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 11am-9pm Monday-Friday (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER LIFESTANCE HEALTH CONEXIONES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES
